[← Back to Home](index.html){.back-button}

# Volunteer Experience

## Volunteer
Burnaby Hospice Society Thrift Store | Current
- Sort and organize donated items including clothing, books, household goods, and furniture
- Price items appropriately for resale
- Assist customers with purchases and inquiries
- Greet customers and ensure positive shopping experience
- Manage cash register and handle payments
- Build connections with donors and regular shoppers
